prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类/理科最低位次分别为约13295名、15067名、13227名、23904名、23925名。2024年江西省高考模式由文理分科改为\"3+1+2\"新高考后，长安 大学物理类最低位次从2023年理科约13227名大幅后移至约23904名，2025年基本持平于23925名，显示新高考模式下该校物理类录取位次已在新平台企稳；2021- 2025年物理类/理科招生计划分别为88人、92人、93人、95人、94人，总体呈小幅扩招趋势。2026年招生计划为106人，较2025年增加12人，扩招幅度约12.8%，属近年最大 增幅，将显著增加招生名额，对位次产生后移（数字增大）压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第89名，近年排名稳定在84- 92名区间，学校层次稳固，对考生有持续吸引力；该校在近年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情，抖音热度排名第83位（评价\"一般\"），短视频曝光量处于中等 水平，报考关注度平稳，无明显过热或过冷信号。历史投档异常记录中未见长安大学相关断档事件；长安大学交通运输工程为A-学科（第五轮学科评估），是该 校王牌学科；道路桥梁与渡河工程、车辆工程、交通运输等专业均为国家级特色专业，在交通基建领域具有较高行业认可度，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 长 安大学位于陕西省西安市，属西北地区211高校。该校在江西省招生计划占比较小，2025年物理类94人、历史类12人，属跨省招生，地域偏好对江西考生影响有限；计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业近年持续高热推荐，长安大学在上述领域均有招生；土木建筑类专业社会热度分化观望，该校土木类招生规模较 大。江西省2026年高考总报名人数约474900人，较2025年（物理类266425+历史类206055=472480）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次23925名、2026年大幅扩招12.8%（推高位次数字增大）以及江西省考生总数小幅增加（推高位次数字减小）等因素，扩招效应占主导，预计2026年物理类 最低录取位次将较2025年后移。预测最低位次约25808名，区间25308-26308名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics/Science categories were approximately 13,295, 15,067, 13,227, 23,904, and 23,925 respectively. After Jiangxi's college entrance exam changed from the arts-science division to the "3+1+2" new system in 2024, Chang'an University's minimum ranking for Physics Category dropped significantly from about 13,227 in 2023 to about 23,904 in 2024, and remained stable at 23,925 in 2025, indicating that the admission ranking has stabilized under the new system. Enrollment plans for Physics/Science from 2021 to 2025 were 88, 92, 93, 95, and 94 respectively, showing a slight expansion trend. The 2026 enrollment plan is 106, an increase of 12 students from 2025, representing an expansion of about 12.8%, the largest increase in recent years, which will significantly increase admission slots and exert downward pressure on rankings (increasing the number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking 89th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 84-92 in recent years. The university's solid reputation continues to attract students. No significant negative public opinion has been observed in recent reputation monitoring. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd (rated as "average"), with moderate short video exposure, indicating stable application interest without obvious overheating or cooling signals. No historical admission anomalies such as gaps have been recorded for Chang'an University. Its Transportation Engineering discipline is rated A- (fifth round of discipline evaluation), making it the university's flagship discipline. Majors such as Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, and Transportation are national characteristic specialties, enjoying high industry recognition in the transportation infrastructure field and strongly attracting students interested in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a 211 university in the Northwest region. Its enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province is relatively small, with 94 students in Physics Category and 12 in History Category in 2025, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Regional preferences have limited impact on Jiangxi candidates. Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication have been consistently popular in recent years, and Chang'an University offers admissions in these fields. Social interest in Civil Engineering and Architecture majors is divided, with the university having a relatively large enrollment scale in Civil Engineering. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Gaokao is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (Physics Category 266,425 + History Category 206,055 = 472,480), leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 23,925, the significant 12.8% enrollment expansion in 2026 (pushing the ranking number upward), and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi (pushing the ranking number downward), the expansion effect dominates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift downward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 25,808, with a range of 25,308 to 26,308.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Chang'an University's Physics Category has significantly expanded enrollment, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 25,808. Candidates with rankings between 25,300 and 25,800 can focus on applying for Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Vehicle Engineering, etc.). Those with rankings between 25,800 and 26,300 are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Road and Bridge Engineering, Transportation, Mechanical Engineering, New Energy, etc.) while also attempting Tier 1 options. Candidates with rankings above 26,300 may consider Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials Science, Architecture, Management, etc.) as safety choices. Chang'an University has outstanding advantages in the transportation infrastructure industry, and majors related to its A- rated Transportation Engineering discipline deserve special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category/Liberal Arts were approximately 2326, 2779, 2699, 3300, and 3952 respectively. Overall, there is a continuous backward trend, moving from about 2326 in 2021 to about 3952 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1626 places, accelerating in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3952. Enrollment plans for History Category/Liberal Arts from 2021 to 2025 were 10, 9, 8, 6, and 12 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. The 2026 enrollment plan is 9, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a 25% reduction, which will intensify competition and exert upward pressure on rankings (decreasing the number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 89th, with a stable ranking range of 84-92 in recent years, indicating a solid university level. Its reputation has been stable in recent years with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd (rated as 'average'), indicating moderate application attention. No historical admission anomalies such as gaps have been observed for Chang'an University. Chang'an University is strong in engineering, with Transportation Engineering rated A- as its strongest discipline. The majors offered in the History Category (Journalism and Communication, English, Public Administration, Ideological and Political Education, Architecture, etc.) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, but the 211 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication has significantly declined (the Zhang Xuefeng effect continues), the popularity of Ideological and Political Education is stable, and Business Administration is polarized with cautious observation. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Gaokao is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a 211 university in the Northwest region. Its enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi is small (only 9 in 2026), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences on Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3952, the 25% reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026 (pushing rankings upward, decreasing the number), and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi (also pushing rankings upward), the reduction effect is significant. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will move upward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3329, with a range of 2829-3829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Chang'an University's History Category enrollment is reduced by 25%, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 3329. Candidates with rankings in the 2829-3329 range can aim for Tier 1 majors (Ideological and Political Education, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration); those in the 3329-3829 range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Administrative Management, English); candidates with rankings below 3829 may consider Tier 3 Architecture as a safety option. Chang'an University is a 211 platform, and although its liberal arts majors are not its strengths, the 211 degree still offers significant advantages in postgraduate studies and employment.
